steps.title: Identify spin upgrade symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your spin installation:
```bash
spin version
spin status 2>&1 | head -20
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review spin configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant spin configuration:
This is a micro-SIP for informing Spin users when there are new versions of their favourite plugins.  It is for discussion.

**Principles:**

* Do not break the user's existing workflow (habits, scripts, etc.).

steps.title: Apply the fix for Plugin upgrades
steps.description:
WIP draft to move Fermyon Cloud command code (`spin cloud deploy` and `spin cloud login`) out of Spin CLI and into a plugin. 

[SIP](https://github.com/kate-goldenring/spin/blob/cloud-plugin-porting/docs/content/sips/014-cloud-plugin.md).

Cloud plugin: https://github.com/fermyon/cloud-plugin

~Do not merge until the plugin is added to the [Spin plugins registry](https://github.com/fermyon/spin-plugins).~ Added

steps.title: Confirm Plugin upgrades is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test spin to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
⚠️ Note: This resolution was work-in-progress at the time of PR submission. WIP draft to move Fermyon Cloud command code (`spin cloud deploy` and `spin cloud login`) out of Spin CLI and into a plugin. 

[SIP](https://github.com/kate-goldenring/spin/blob/cloud-plugin-porting/docs/content/sips/014-cloud-plugin.md).

prerequisites.description: A working spin installation or development environment.
